titleBar.main: Senior Growth Architect & AI Product Lead
titleBar.sub: Expertise: Web Engineering • Agentic AI Automation • Full-Stack SEO • Data-Driven GTM

header.name: Meysam Soheilipour
header.address: US Citizen, Based in Mexico City (Remote)

summary.value: Senior growth and AI product leader with 10+ years driving measurable revenue, platform scale, and digital transformation across travel tech, media, and e-commerce—including B2B SaaS and enterprise software GTM. Owns outcomes end-to-end: P&L-minded prioritization, stakeholder alignment, and cross-functional leadership across marketing, product, engineering, and data. Combines full-stack SEO with Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and content ingestibility for LLM visibility—structuring entities, schema, and crawl-friendly surfaces so brands rank in AI answers as well as traditional search. Builds agentic automation (Python, n8n, LLM orchestration) to shorten GTM cycles, scale content operations, and operationalize experimentation. Proven record establishing organizational infrastructure from the ground up, running technical programs (migrations, cloud, APIs), and delivering incrementality-tested growth in remote, global environments.

professionalExperience.title: President & Product Director — Global Travel Marketplace

description.value:
Founded in 2018 as ChinaWayz.com and later consolidated under the Trip Ways brand; resumed full-time leadership after Red Ventures with P&L ownership for scaling the marketplace globally, including market research and partnership strategy to expand reach and supply.

Established the organizational infrastructure for product, growth, engineering, and vendor operations from the ground up—aligning stakeholders across a distributed team of 20 and 900 vendor companies serving 15,000 bookable products and 5,000 travelers.

Scaled a two-sided marketplace by owning product and growth execution end-to-end: catalog quality, traveler access to authentic affordable experiences, and transaction efficiency—measured by sustained supply growth and operational reliability.

Directed development of a high-performance cloud WordPress platform for multi-vendor travel commerce, integrating real-time booking, automated inventory lifecycles, and agentic AI workflows that reduced manual publishing overhead and accelerated time-to-market for new tours.

Led a large-scale replatform and content migration while preserving marketplace continuity; improved discoverability and technical SEO/AEO foundations for long-term scale.

Improved activation and conversion as measured by funnel lift, by shipping website personalization and AI-powered semantic search and recommendations across live inventory.

Secured and maintained Google Things To Do (GTTD) partner status by passing Google's data-quality and compliance review, building an agentic AI curation pipeline that vetted and structured thousands of tours across 900+ global vendor partners for accuracy, policy compliance, and search eligibility.

Grew partnership revenue channels as measured by affiliate and OTA performance, by managing global programs with Viator, TourRadar, Travelzoo, and aligning stakeholders on tracking, deals, and channel mix across organic and paid.

Delivered an estimated 8x return on ad spend on Meta with a self-produced UGC video campaign—writing, filming, and editing destination content in Khao Sok, Phuket, and Bali—demonstrating that low-cost, founder-led creative could outperform traditional paid media production.

Directed cross-functional execution across internal teams and vendor partners in 70 countries; hired and scaled distributed support for 24/7 coverage with clear operating cadences and accountability.

professionalExperience.title: Sr. Growth Marketing – Audience and SEO

description.value:
Drove audience and commerce growth for CNET Media & Commerce business across Google, YouTube, Amazon, and CNET.com—including enterprise paid media and ABM-style initiatives—with stakeholder alignment across leadership, product, engineering, data, editorial, commerce, and video.

Lifted on-page conversions by 1% and affiliate partnership ROI by 7% as measured by incrementality and partnership analytics, by leading cross-functional UX and widget experiments on video and affiliate surfaces.

Delivered $1.5M in incremental revenue during major shopping events (e.g., Prime Day, Black Friday) as measured by commerce reporting, by owning strategy, deals lineups, content recommendations, and campaign optimization across brands.

Improved real-time decision speed for editorial and growth leaders as measured by adoption of Looker dashboards and pipeline reliability, by building end-to-end data pipelines and interactive reporting for media and commerce KPIs.

Increased video traffic and revenue by 15% as measured by platform analytics, by owning cross-platform video SEO strategy, authoring the CNET video SEO playbook, and running global enablement sessions to operationalize best practices.

Strengthened B2B audience engagement and revenue attribution as measured by Salesforce/Pardot funnel quality, by integrating marketing automation with broader marketing operations.

Reduced manual cycle time for SEO, forecasting, content, and video workflows as measured by team throughput, by shipping AI-assisted solutions and integrations for analysis, planning, and production optimization.

Scaled Amazon publishing revenue by 600% within six months as measured by program dashboards, by automating SEO pipelines, tightening content architecture for conversion, and day-to-day program operations.

Established the organizational infrastructure for marketing, engineering, and sales from the ground up; scaled an e-commerce company to a 50-person organization with P&L accountability, stakeholder alignment, and cross-functional leadership.

Grew audience and authority as measured by ~10M monthly visitors, global rank ~999 (top 20 in Iran), and a library of ~55,000 resources across 800+ categories—by owning platform architecture, editorial systems, and technical execution for Farsi-language content (articles, podcasts, forums).

Achieved top-tier organic visibility as measured by 15M+ monthly sessions and ~80% organic share, by leading content strategy, full-stack SEO, and crawl-friendly publishing at national scale.

Improved pipeline quality and monetization as measured by funnel and CRM metrics, by running full-funnel digital marketing with Salesforce, ABM frameworks, LinkedIn Advertising, and integrated SEO/SEM and lifecycle programs.

Raised team throughput and quality as measured by editorial velocity and execution standards, by hiring and mentoring content managers, SEO specialists, and copywriters with clear operating guidelines.

Increased budget and campaign precision as measured by GA4/Universal Analytics insights, by institutionalizing performance reporting, funnel analysis, and continuous optimization.

Lifted transaction efficiency as measured by CRO program results, by running structured experimentation across high-traffic surfaces.

Reduced infrastructure cost by 40% while improving performance and UX as measured by hosting spend and speed metrics, by leading migration from a legacy CMS to WordPress on self-managed AWS.

professionalExperience.company: Early Career — QA, Digital Marketing & SEO
professionalExperience.title: QA Technician, Digital Marketing Manager & SEO Specialist

description.value:
Built foundational cross-functional experience spanning quality assurance, digital marketing operations, and technical SEO across three roles before moving into e-commerce leadership.

At Lam Research (Oregon, USA), executed hardware/software QA test plans for semiconductor manufacturing equipment, reducing defect escape risk and supporting on-time customer launches.

At Nilgasht Travel Agency (Tehran, Iran), increased online bookings 40% and customer engagement 25% by leading integrated SEO, SEM, social, and email campaigns and implementing CRM automation.

At Hamrah Ltd (London, UK), delivered an average ~60% organic ranking improvement for B2B and B2C clients through technical SEO audits, keyword strategy, and paid/organic campaign management.

footnote.value: AI-assisted development & code review (Cursor / LLM workflows).
